		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

                 We are excited to share the first issue of emQube's monthly
newsletter. Each issue is created to inspire and inform you on a range
of topics connected to business and personal development. We hope
you find our content useful and share it with your friends and
colleagues.
<p id="s-txt">
                 This newsletter is written, designed and developed by the emQube's content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY @ WORK</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2022/technology-work.jpg" alt="Sitting on Data is a Crime"></div>
<h3>Sitting on data is a crime</h3>
By now all business owners have heard the term; Data is the new oil. How many have understood and started exploiting the new oil? There is a cost involved in mining data, but the benefits can easily outstrip the cost if the right questions are sought to be answered.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/sitting-on-data-is-a-crime/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: 2 mins &gt;
</a>
<div class="b-img">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2022/headless-cms.jpg" alt="Running headless may not be such a bad thing for a CMS"></div>
<h3>Running headless may not be such a bad thing for a CMS</h3>
The familiar phrase – Running like a headless chicken – may evoke derisive laughter but when it comes to Website Development, running a headless CMS is the most sophisticated way to run a superfast and versatile website across different user-interfaces.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/running-headless-may-not-be-such-a-bad-thing-for-a-cms/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: 3 mins &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>SUCCESS MANTRAS</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                    <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2022/it's-never-too-late-to-get-on-linkedin.jpg" alt="It's never too late to get on
                       LinkedIn">
<h3>It's never too late to get on
LinkedIn</h3>
Marketing yourself among an ocean of professionals is daunting, but if you know how to create content, connect with the right people and be consistent, you'll invariably build a name for yourself.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/its-never-too-late-to-get-on-linkedin/" rel="noopener">
Read the full article &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2022/calendar-your-way-out-of-chaos.jpg" alt="Calendar your way out of chaos">
<h3>Calendar your way out of chaos</h3>
'Planning your work and working your plan' is the key to making the most out of your time and increasing productivity. We've listed a few useful tips for you to calendar your way to success.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/calendar-your-way-out-of-chaos/" rel="noopener">
Read the full article &gt;
</a>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

    Our second issue incorporates the feedback we received so
generously from our readers. Each issue is created to inspire and
inform you on a range of topics connected to business and personal
development. We hope you find our content useful and share it with
your friends and colleagues.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed, and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>@ WORK</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2022/emiratis-1.jpg" alt="Emiratization"></div>
<h3>Emiratization is Good for Private Businesses</h3>
The penalty for missing the Emiratization target is AED 72000. Is that the only reason to create a more inclusive company? We suggest five reasons why meeting targets is good for private enterprises.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/emiratization-is-good-for-private-businesses/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (1 mins) &gt; </a>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2022/whatsapp-for-business-1.jpg" alt="WhatsApp"></div>
<h3>WhatsApp Business Can Multiply Profits</h3>
WhatsApp revenue from services may be the sole reason why Mark Zukerberg paid billions to acquire it. Large and small businesses are reaping the benefits of the features of out-of-box WhatsApp-for-Business (WAB) as well as the customer service and commerce automation possible via integration.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/whatsapp-for-business/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (1 mins) &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>HEALTH IS WEALTH</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2022/decluttering-workplaces.jpg" alt="Biophilia">
<h3>Biophilia: Fad or Future?</h3>
During the pandemic isolation within four walls magnified our feelings of restlessness and taught us the significance of nature. That’s when Biophilia 'humans connect with nature’ gained prominence.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/biophilia-fad-or-future/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2022/sitting.jpg" alt="Standup to Live Longer">
<h3>Standup to Live Longer</h3>
If you calculate the amount of time you sit all day you'll be surprised. This 'glued to a chair' form of physical entrapment is leading you towards a sedentary lifestyle and will deteriorate your health over time.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/standup-to-live-longer/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
</div>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

    Our third issue features a new column Guest Guru, allowing experts to share their experience and wisdom. We'd be most happy to feature you too. As always, we appreciate your feedback and help in spreading the word.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed, and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2022/chatgpt.jpg" alt="ChatGPT"></div>
<h3>Why is Everyone Talking about ChatGPT?</h3>
By now you may have already heard and read if not played, the phenomenon called ChatGPT. Hopes are high that it may accelerate the adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Natural Language Processing (NPL) in daily life. So, what exactly is ChatGPT?

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/why-is-everyone-talking-about-chatgpt/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (1 min) &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>GUEST GURU</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2022/are-we-too-expensive.jpg" alt="Are We Too Expensive"></div>
<h3>When Customers Say we're Expensive? Are We?</h3>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="b-club">
<div class="container">
<div class="guest-guru">
<div class="left"><a href="https://www.maxsalesolutions.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2022/peter-photo.jpg" alt="Peter Heredia"> </a>
<h3>Peter Heredia</h3>
</div>
<div class="right">

    When our customers say we're too expensive they have only two motives for saying this: They want to buy from us but by saying this they’re trying to get a discount, or they don’t want to buy from us and just want to let us down gently. So let's understand what's going on in their mind?

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/are-we-really-too-expensive/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (2 mins) &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="em-contain">

    Managing Director of Maxsale Solutions, a company that helps improve the sales team's performance.

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2022/universe.jpg" alt="Universe">
<h3>Are we alone in the Universe?</h3>
Sci-fi author Arthur Clarke once famously said 'Two possibilities exist: Either we're alone in the universe, or we're not. Both are equally terrifying.' Despite our incredible technological advancements, we're yet to receive any signal or communication from extraterrestrial life.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/are-we-alone-in-the-universe/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2022/energy-protect.jpg" alt="Energy Protect">
<h3>Energy-draining Vampires Around?</h3>
Keeping your energy high is crucial to achieving your goals and leading a content-filled life. However In today's times, so many things are beyond control. While there’s no Laxman-Rekha (imaginary circle) against negative experiences a few of these tips will help guard your energy.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/be-on-guard-from-energy-draining-vampires/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>

    border-bottom: 1px solid #eeeeee;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container {
      border-bottom: 0;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top {
    display: flex;
    padding: 25px 0 10px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top {
      flex-direction: column;
      padding-bottom: 25px;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left {
    margin-right: 20px;
    width: 50%;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left {
      width: 100%;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left p {
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 19px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left p br {
      display: none;
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 414px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left p {
      font-size: 20px;
      line-height: 22px;
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 375px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .left p {
      font-size: 18px;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .right {
    width: 50%;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .right {
      width: 100%;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .right #c-no {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 800;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 414px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp footer .container .top .right #c-no {
      font-size: 17px;
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 375px) {

    }

    }

      font-size: 17px;
    }
  }

    color: #60b86e;

    height: 1px;
  }

    text-align: center;
  }

    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp{
    max-width: 600px !important;
    margin: 0 auto;
    border: 1px solid #eeeeee;
    box-shadow: 0px 1px 12px rgba(0,0,0,20%);
  }

    .issue-detail-wrapp{
      max-width: 100% !important;
    }

		<title><![CDATA[Issue 5 / Feb 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-5/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 24 Feb 2023 09:03:18 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=3831</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

            Our fifth issue challenges you to visualize an earth without humans.
Scary, but opens your eyes to our selfish nature and makes you think
of sustainability more seriously. Also, checkout Notion, of which
you may not have any notions about as yet. Happy Reading, and do
spread our emQonnect.
<p id="s-txt">
            This newsletter is written, designed, and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>Business</h2>
<div class="b-img">
        <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/february2023/circular-economy.webp" alt="Circular Economy"></div>
<h3>Circular Economy: What’s that?</h3>
Have you been hearing about circular economy but haven’t yet got to pinning it down? This is a new term in vogue connected to sustainability which is on the top of the agenda for most companies as well as countries. Read more about how this circular economy can save the world.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/circular-economy-whats-that/" rel="noopener">
Read more: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container p-top">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<div class="b-img">
            <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/february2023/have-you-tried-notion.webp" alt="Are We Too Expensive"></div>
<h3>Have you tried Notion?</h3>
People love Apple products for their minimalist design and intuitive interface. If you are an Apple fan, then you will love Notion, a no-nonsense light but versatile tool for running not just your life but your full company.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/have-you-tried-notion/" rel="noopener">
Read more: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                    <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/february2023/lateral-thinking.webp" alt="Lateral Thinking">
<h3>Lateral Thinking – The Key to New Possibilities</h3>
The ability to approach a problem or challenge from different angles is a great skill to possess.  It essentially involves ‘outside the box’ thinking or better ‘throwing the box away’ to arrive at unconventional solutions for your problems.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/lateral-thinking-the-key-to-new-possibilities/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/february2023/humans-go-extinct.webp" alt="Humans go Extinct">
<h3>What happens when Humans go Extinct?</h3>
The extinction of the human species is a topic that has been widely debated. But what would happen if humans suddenly vanished from the face of the Earth? Let’s look at the immediate and the long-term scenario of such an eventuality.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/what-happens-when-humans-go-extinct/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</div>

  padding-bottom: 45px;
}
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .issue-detail-wrapp .b-club .container .club-content {
    flex-direction: column;
    max-width: 90%;
    align-items: center;
  }
}

  margin-left: 25px;
}

    margin-left: 0;
    margin-top: 25px;
  }
}

  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 19px;
}

  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

  max-width: 550px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  padding-top: 20px;
}

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Issue 6 / Mar 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-6/</link>
		<pubDate>Sat, 18 Mar 2023 06:13:24 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=4464</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

                      Our subscriber base is growing thanks to your positive feedback. In this issue check out the simple technique of 'Rubber Ducking' out of a dilemma, and read about two powerful NLP tools explained by our Guest Guru Dhiral Doshi. Do forward to your friends if you find our content worthy of sharing.
<p id="s-txt">
                      This newsletter is written, designed, and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                      <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/march2023/rubber_duck.webp" alt="Rubber Duck"></div>
<h3>Rubber Ducking Out of a Dilemma</h3>
Psychology may not be the realm of software developers but here’s a simple super trick that depends on behavioural science that has helped many a programmer and could be the answer to taking complex decisions or resolving a dilemma. Get a rubber duck, yes a toy duck. Place it on your desk and now try to explain your problem as simply as possible. And quite magically the silent non-responsive duck will show you the path.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/rubber-ducking-out-of-a-dilemma/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: (1 min) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>GUEST GURU</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                      <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/march2023/nlp.webp" alt="NLP"></div>
<h3>My Two Cents on NLP</h3>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="b-club">
<div class="container">
<div class="guest-guru">
<div class="left">
                      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhiral-doshi-333166a7/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/march2023/dhiral-doshi.webp" alt="Dhiral Doshi"></a>
<h3>Dhiral Doshi</h3>
</div>
<div class="right">

                         Neuro-Linguistic Programming is a way of changing thoughts and actions to improve well-being. At a training program I recently attended I learned many new concepts that I believe will help people to have better conversations and enhance interpersonal relationships. Of the many tools I came across, I discuss the two — Paraphrasing and Metaphoring.
<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/my-two-cents-on-nlp/" rel="noopener">Reading time: (1 min) &gt;</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="em-contain">

                      Dhiral Doshi is the Chairman of <a href="https://www.vivandigroup.com/" target="_blank" style="color: #000000 !important; text-decoration: underline;" rel="noopener">Vivandi Group </a> &amp; <a href="https://williamdoshi.com/home/" target="_blank" style="color: #000000 !important; text-decoration: underline;" rel="noopener">William and Daniel Doshi Group of Companies</a>.

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                         <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/march2023/clutter.webp" alt="Clutter">
<h3>Clutter Filling your Life</h3>
More will lead us to happiness is a misconception we have. Filling our houses, our offices and our minds with more than we can manage only adds to our worries. When things get too much it turns to clutter, and robs us of our peace of mind. Here are the 6 kinds of clutter that get in your way.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/which-type-of-clutter-is-filling-your-life/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right">
                      <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/march2023/solitude.webp" alt="Solitude">
<h3>Solitude is not Loneliness</h3>
Solitude is not loneliness, in simple words being alone is not always lonely. There is a philosophical difference between the two and choosing to be alone certainly has some plus points. So, when was the last time you spent some quality time with yourself?

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/solitude-is-not-loneliness-spend-time-with-yourself/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</section></div>]]></content:encoded>

		<wp:meta_value><![CDATA[.issue-detail-wrapp body, .issue-detail-wrapp html, .issue-detail-wrapp p, .issue-detail-wrapp h1, .issue-detail-wrapp h2, .issue-detail-wrapp h3, .issue-detail-wrapp h4, .issue-detail-wrapp h5, .issue-detail-wrapp h6, .issue-detail-wrapp a {

  letter-spacing: 0;
}

    margin: 0;

}

  text-decoration: none;

<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

                    In our seventh issue check out some simple yet effective ways to fine-tune your listening skills and hear the unspoken words of a friend or colleague. Also read more about the space race to tap into celestial resources. If you find our content useful and interesting do forward our newsletter to your contacts.
<p id="s-txt">
                    This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                      <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/april2023/listen-the-unspoken.webp" alt="Listen The Unspoken"></div>
<h3>Listen The Unspoken</h3>
Hearing may be defined by physical ability but listening is an emotional exercise. We may not hear sounds that bats can hear but as humans we must develop the ability to listen the unspoken. Read about the listening skills that can help you grow.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/listen-the-unspoken/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: (1 min) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                      <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/april2023/investing-in-space-technologies.webp" alt="Investing in Space Technologies, Why?"></div>
<h3>Investing in Space Technologies, Why?</h3>
Why is there so much commercial interest in space technologies? Why Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, Richard Branson and likes are racing to conquer space. Read to find out.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/whats-the-space-race-odyssey/" rel="noopener">

</a>

<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                         <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/april2023/the-art-of-being-a-good-loser.webp" alt="The Art of Being a Good Loser">
<h3>The Art of Being a Good Loser</h3>
Winning is thrilling, but winning is never guaranteed. In any game or tournament you cannot avoid the pain of losing, but you can learn ways to better respond to the concept of losing.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-art-of-being-a-good-loser/" rel="noopener">

</a>

</div>

<h3>Can Emotion AI do More Harm than Good?</h3>
The film M3GAN is an A.I. cautionary tale that depicts how Emotion detecting robots can override codes and do the unexpected. The concern is if AI could interpret Human Emotions will it do more harm than good?

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/can-emotion-ai-do-more-harm-than-good/" rel="noopener">

  text-decoration: none;

<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

    In our May issue check out a few things you need to unlearn so that you can learn the new. Also read more about the reasons your activities are tracked online. If you find our content useful and interesting do forward our newsletter to your friends and colleagues.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                          <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/may2023/the-unlearning-project.webp" alt="Listen The Unlearning Project"></div>
<h3>The Unlearning Project</h3>
The first time I felt the urgent need to ‘unlearn’ was while appearing for the Driving License tests in Dubai. I soon understood that getting a license was not about learning to drive safely in Dubai, but it was about unlearning the habits of Mumbai driving. Read this short article that reminds you of a few things that're worthy of unlearning.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-unlearning-project/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: (1 min) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                          <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/may2023/online-tracking.webp" alt="Internet tracking"></div>
<h3>Being Followed Online?</h3>
Ever felt like advertisements are following you from web pages to your social media feeds? The answer is yes. You are being tracked online and you’re not alone. Read to find out how and why.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/internet-tracking-someones-following-you-online/" rel="noopener">
Reading time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                             <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/may2023/reading-energies.webp" alt="Can you Sense Energies">
<h3>Can you Sense Energies?</h3>
Have you noticed you feel good to be around certain people while you feel drained and want to get away from some? The art of sensing others’ energies is crucial to differentiating between healthy and toxic relationships.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/sensing-energies-healthy-vs-toxic-relationships/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right">
                          <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/may2023/parenting-digital-natives.webp" alt="Parenting Digital Natives">
<h3>Parenting Digital Natives</h3>
How to parent children in the digital age is a question most families have. As children browse for more information online and become more connected on social media platforms, parents need to ensure their child’s digital safety.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/parenting-digital-natives/" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

		<wp:meta_value><![CDATA[.issue-detail-wrapp body, .issue-detail-wrapp html, .issue-detail-wrapp p, .issue-detail-wrapp h1, .issue-detail-wrapp h2, .issue-detail-wrapp h3, .issue-detail-wrapp h4, .issue-detail-wrapp h5, .issue-detail-wrapp h6, .issue-detail-wrapp a {

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Issue 9 / June 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-9-june-2023/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 19 Jun 2023 10:17:42 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.emqubeweb.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=5718</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

                     In our June issue, check out why the Middle East has become a powerhouse of opportunity, drawing in talented professionals from across the globe. Also read more on why MFA is essential to safeguard you against data breaches. If you find our content interesting do forward our newsletter to your friends or colleagues.
<p id="s-txt">
                     This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                     <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/june2023/talent-flows-to-the-middle-east.webp" alt="Talent flows to the Middle East"></div>
<h3>Talent flows to the Middle East</h3>
In recent years the Middle East has experienced 35% increase in skilled talent migration. Also the Middle East is projected to be home to 3.5 million skilled expatriates by 2025, further enriching the region’s talent landscape. In this article, we explain the reasons why talent finds its way to this region.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/talent-migration-talent-flows-to-the-middle-east/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq9" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img">
                     <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/june2023/mfa.webp" alt="MFA"></div>
<h3>MFA saves you from lazy losses</h3>
Leaks and hacks from recent years have made it clear that passwords alone don’t provide enough security to your online accunts. So instead of asking yourself why you should enable MFA, it’s time to ask yourself why you haven’t already done it.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/mfa-saves-you-from-lazy-losses/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq9" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (1 min) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">
                        <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/june2023/control-emotional-eating.webp" alt="Control emotional eating">
<h3>Control emotional eating</h3>
Do you feel the urge to eat certain foods when stressed but not necessarily hungry? Strange but true, emotions affect your mood as well as your appetite. Therefore, overcoming emotional eating is important to your health.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/control-emotional-eating/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq9" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right">
                     <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/june2023/excellence-vs-perfection.webp" alt="Excellence vs Perfection">
<h3>Excellence vs Perfection</h3>
To be perfect in an imperfect world is often an idealized concept. In our quest to attain ‘perfection’, we end up feeling more miserable and inadequate. Research has shown that while perfectionism breaks us down, aiming for excellence builds us up.

<a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/excellence-vs-perfection/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq9" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Issue 10 / July 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-10-july-2023/</link>
		<pubDate>Mon, 24 Jul 2023 13:16:47 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.emqubeweb.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=5762</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

In our July issue, know why thinking small in business tech can hurt. Also, discover a few simple tips to manage several tasks and propel your productivity at the workplace. If you find our content interesting do forward our newsletter to your contacts.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/july2023/business-tech.webp" alt="Business Tech" /></div>
<h3>Thinking Small in Business Tech Hurts</h3>
SMEs are afraid to invest in technology and they are not to blame. A variety of reasons can be attributed and responsibility for this has to be borne not just by the founder but also the tech companies and the popular press. Perhaps you as a MSME would agree to some of the reasons highlighted in this article.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/thinking-small-in-business-tech-hurts/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq10" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/july2023/how-to-be-productive.webp" alt="How to be Productive" /></div>
<h3>One Person, Many Things: How to be Productive</h3>
In a world buzzing with constant notifications, endless tasks and responsibilities, you can easily get robbed of your focus and let your priorities fall by the wayside. Here are a few simple tips that can help you manage several tasks and propel your productivity at the workplace.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/one-person-many-things-how-to-be-productive/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq10" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/july2023/when-to-quit.webp" alt="When to Quit" />
<h3>When to Persevere vs When to Quit</h3>
A lot of content is built around how to persevere until you achieve. The problem is that not many of us know when it’s time to quit. If something is destined to be unsuccessful it’s best to change direction or pause.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/when-to-persevere-vs-when-to-quit/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq10" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/july2023/success-addiction.webp" alt="Success Addiction" />
<h3>Why Success Addiction isn’t Always Good</h3>
There's nothing wrong with being highly ambitious and striving to achieve great things in life. However, turning it into an obsession or addiction can have detrimental consequences on your well-being and happiness.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/why-success-addiction-isnt-always-good/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq10" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</div>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

We are almost a year old. Our 11th issue unravels the 'X' factor around Elon Musk and gives you tell-tale signs of a failing leader. The Art of Resting is as good as our article on Navigating Post-Success blues. Read and forward if you find our content interesting.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/august2023/twitter-to-x.webp" alt="Twitter to X" /></div>
<h3>What the ‘X’ is Happening?</h3>
The saga of Elon Musk and Twitter is still unfolding. By renaming Twitter to X, Musk has hinted at why he paid billions of dollars to acquire it. Read to find out why we think he did so.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/what-the-x-is-happening/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/august2023/leadership-style-is-failing.webp" alt="Leadership Style is Failing" /></div>
<h3>Signs your Leadership Style is Failing</h3>
Leadership title is not a crown on your head, rather it’s a set of responsibilities that emerge from it. The problem is when leaders develop a know-it-all attitude and consider themselves infallible, they miserably fail. Read to know more.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/4-signs-your-leadership-style-is-failing/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">

<img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/august2023/the-art-of-resting.webp" alt="The Art of Resting" />
<h3>The Art of Resting</h3>
As our lives get busier than ever and various pressures mount on us, we forget the importance of stepping back and resting for a while. Read why incorporating rest in your schedule is essential.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-art-of-resting/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

<img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/august2023/navigating-post-success-blues.webp" alt="Navigating Post-Success Blues" />
<h3>Navigating Post-Success Blues</h3>
Success is often portrayed as the pinnacle of human endeavor. Yet, beneath its surface lurks an unsettling phenomenon - the Post-Success Blues.

					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Issue 12 / Sep 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-12-september-2023/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 21 Sep 2023 09:17:27 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.wp.emqubeweb.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=5942</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

Our 12th issue marks the completion of a year of emQonnect. Thank you for your readership. In this issue we show you the way to Digital Transformation in our article Go Paperless. Our other content shows you how to interpret body language, as a leader embrace imperfections, and finally, how to rekindle your relationship with nature.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/september2023/go-paperless.webp" alt="Go Paperless – Digital Transformation Tip" /></div>
<h3>Go Paperless – Digital Transformation Tip</h3>
FOMO (Fear of Missing Out) on digital transformation is haunting businesses that are lagging behind because they find it hard to get on the train. Start thinking of a paperless office and you’ll know how to get aboard.
<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/go-paperless/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (1 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/september2023/mastering-the-art.webp" alt="Mastering the Art of Reading Body Language" /></div>
<h3>Mastering the Art of Reading Body Language</h3>
As far as the dynamics of human interactions are concerned, words are just one part of the equation. Much of our communication happens without uttering a single syllable. The cues lie in our gestures, postures and expressions, a language you need to decipher.
<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/mastering-the-art-of-reading-body-language/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/september2023/eco-spirituality-mindful-1.webp" alt="The Art of Resting" />
<h3>Eco-Spirituality: Mindful Awakening in Nature</h3>
Being amidst nature is a refreshing feel. These moments lend you peace and clarity. So, if you’ve felt a sacred connection with nature and want to deepen it here are ways.
<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/eco-spirituality-mindful-awakening-in-nature/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/september2023/leaders-take-off-your-mask.webp" alt="Leaders Take Off your Mask" />
<h3>Leaders Take Off your Mask</h3>
Imperfections make us human and interesting. However, a few leaders rather than embracing their imperfections try to conceal it. Learn why this projection of perfection creates a disconnect from your people.
<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/leaders-take-off-your-mask/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</div>

							</item>
					<item>
		<title><![CDATA[Issue 13 / Oct 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-13-oct-2023/</link>
		<pubDate>Fri, 27 Oct 2023 07:08:29 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.wp.emqubeweb.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=6158</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

Our 13th issue emphasizes on how task automation optimizes workflow and reduces rate of errors. We also orient you to the PARA method to organize your digital files and expedite tasks. Also learn about the origin of conflict and the benefits of giving.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2023/every-thing-works-better-together.webp" alt="Every Thing Works Better Together" /></div>
<h3>Try 'Task Automation'</h3>
Task Automation is a simple yet powerful way to speed up your business, cut errors, save time and reduce costs. Giving it an esoteric name like RPA (Robotic Process Automation) has been an obstacle to its large-scale implementation. Read about how to get on the RPA (Task Automation) journey.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/try-task-automation/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2023/para.webp" alt="PARA" /></div>
<h3>Organize Your Digital Life with PARA</h3>
It may be difficult to believe that your complicated digital files can be sorted and stored into just four categories. By simply organizing your heaps of files and having all the resources in the right place, you can execute your tasks faster. Know more.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/organize-your-digital-life-with-para/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2023/conflict.webp" alt="Conflict" />
<h3>The Origin of Conflict</h3>
Conflict is an intrinsic part of human history and is influenced by a multitude of factors. To understand how conflicts can be stopped, it's essential to delve into their origins and analyze strategies for resolution.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-origin-of-conflict-can-it-be-stopped/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/october2023/charity-giving.webp" alt="Charity Giving" />
<h3>The Feel-Good Part of Giving</h3>
Apart from simply feeling good, evidence suggests that the selfless act of giving or helping others has positive effects on your physical as well as mental health.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-feel-good-part-of-giving/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</div>
</section></div>]]></content:encoded>

		<title><![CDATA[Issue 14 / Nov 2023]]></title>

		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

In this issue we emphasize on how to mitigate the risk of IT project failures. Next discover how minimalism in business and life can lead to a more fulfilling existence. Also learn about the concept of Wu Wei and how to break free from the chains of FOPO.

If you find this newsletter interesting, and think someone else might too, please forward it along.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2023/project-failures.webp" alt="Mitigate the Risk of IT Project Failures" /></div>
<h3>Mitigate the Risk of IT Project Failures</h3>
When 7 out of 10 IT projects fail it demotivates business owners from investing in much needed digital transformation. Read my expert advice on how to mitigate the risks of IT failures.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/mitigate-the-risk-of-it-project-failures/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2023/minimalism.webp" alt="Minimalism in Business and Life" /></div>
<h3>Minimalism in Business and Life</h3>
In a world inundated with the relentless pursuit of more, minimalism emerges as a beacon of simplicity that urges us to shed the excess and find meaning in the essential. Read more.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/minimalism-simplify-your-life//" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2023/wuwei.webp" alt="When You Need to Take a Step Back" />
<h3>Wu Wei: When You Need to Take a Step Back</h3>
There are many instances in life when trying too hard makes things worse. Overthinking and overdoing only exacerbates the problem, leading to more stress and a lack of meaningful progress.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/wu-wei-when-you-step-back/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/november2023/fopo.webp" alt="FOPO" />
<h3>Break Free from the Chains of FOPO</h3>
‘I don’t give a shit about what they think’ is when you finally break the chains of FOPO (Fear Of Other People’s Opinions) and are no longer beholden to what others think of you anymore.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/break-free-from-the-chains-of-fopo/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
Read more &gt;
</a>

</div>

		<title><![CDATA[Issue 15 / Dec 2023]]></title>
		<link>https://mohammeds108.sg-host.com/issue/issue-15-dec-2023/</link>
		<pubDate>Thu, 21 Dec 2023 07:10:06 +0000</pubDate>
		<dc:creator><![CDATA[geo-admin]]></dc:creator>
		<guid isPermaLink="false">https://www.wp.emqubeweb.com/?post_type=issue&#038;p=6292</guid>
		<description></description>
		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp"><section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

In this issue discover how companies with big customer base are eating up traditional businesses. Next learn how to find Meraki in your everyday life. Also, get tips to stick to your New Year Resolutions.

If you find this newsletter interesting, please forward it along.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section><section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>BUSINESS</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2023/emirates-airlines.webp" alt="Emirates Airlines" /></div>
<h3>Will Emirates Airlines Sell House Mortgages?</h3>
Brick-and-mortar companies were eaten up by online startups and now companies with large customer base are eating up conventional providers. Read to find out if your business is endangered by poachers.
<div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/will-emirates-airlines-sell-house-mortgages/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Reading Time: (2 mins) &gt;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/7sFW46vfljns8v1AdWKHSl" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify" /></a></div>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img">

<img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2023/meraki.webp" alt="Meraki" />
<h3>‘Meraki’ in All That You Do</h3>
Wish to live a more intentional and impactful life? Then knitting the philosophy of Meraki into everything you do will truly enrich your life. Meraki means putting yourself - your soul - into whatever you are doing.
<div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/igniting-meraki-in-everything-you-do/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Read more &gt;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/0CERQEmkdi0nFUxKrlou9a" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify" /></a></div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="right">

<img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/december2023/new-year-resolutions.webp" alt="New Year Resolutions" />
<h3>Sticking To Your New Year Resolutions</h3>
New Year Resolutions are often ridiculed, because the excitement to achieve them dwindles with each month. Sticking to your resolutions requires resolute motivation from day one till the end of the year.
<div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/sticking-to-your-new-year-resolutions/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Read more &gt;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/5LRiGYg2TqysHfBAKe8mGi" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify" /></a></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section></div>]]></content:encoded>

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class=issue-detail-wrapp>
    <section class="g-content">
        <div class="container">
           <div class="content-wrap">
              <p>In this issue discover how companies can leverage the power of drip marketing to reap the full benefit of their customer relationships over their life cycle. Next explore how good content can drive your digital marketing strategy. Also, learn how forest bathing can positively impact your health.</p>
              <p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed and developed by our content team.</p>
           </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <section class="technology">
        <div class="container">
           <div class="work-content d-width">
              <h2>BUSINESS</h2>
              <div class="b-img">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2024/email-drip-marketing.webp" alt="Drip Marketing">
              </div>
              <h3>Are you Drip Marketing? Not Yet?</h3>
              <p>Drip marketing is like drip irrigation. You use less water to grow your crop by irrigating frequently but in small doses. Read to find out how you can exploit this powerful CRM technique...</p>
              <div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/are-you-drip-marketing-not-yet/" rel="noopener">Reading Time: (2 mins) &#62;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/5tUZlCQwK3ajBbFVmonUui" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify"></a>
              </div>
           </div>
        </div>
    </section>
    <div class="border"></div>
    <section class="s-mantras">
        <div class="container">
           <h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
           <div class="blog-content d-width">
              <div class="left">
                 <div class="d-img">
                    <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2024/shinrinyoku.webp" alt="Shinrin-Yoku">
                    <h3>The Rejuvenating Effect of Shinrin-Yoku</h3>
                    <p>Spending some time in nature is a must to digitally detox from devices and help you unwind for the day. Nature has the power to make us feel good and ward off technostress.</p>
                    <div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-rejuvenating-effect-of-shinrin-yoku/" rel="noopener">Read more &#62;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/0mhmTWnekOtld9MK0xx8zQ" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify"></a>
                    </div>
                 </div>
              </div>
              <div class="right">
                 <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2024/content-marketing.webp" alt="Content Marketing">
                 <h3>Content Marketing Will Rule</h3>
                 <p>Without good content your brand is invisible to your potential customers and your company is lagging in the digital realm. Over the years content marketing has turned into a mission-critical growth method for most businesses.</p>
                <div class="blog-url"><a class="b-read" target="_blank" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/content-marketing-to-rule/" rel="noopener">Read more &#62;</a><a href="https://open.spotify.com/episode/4cWN0Q5vS9RCBzxXEwGz3l" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/listen-on-spotify.webp" alt="Spotify"></a>
                </div>

    max-width: 550px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding-top: 10px;
    padding-bottom: 35px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .issue-detail-wrapp .b-club .container .em-contain {
      max-width: 90%;
    }
  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp .b-club .container .em-contain p {
    font-style: italic;
    font-size: 14px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 767px) {

      font-size: 16px;
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 320px) {

  }

  }
  .issue-detail-wrapp .b-club .container .f-btn a {

    background-color: #60b86e;
    padding: 12px 20px;

    font-weight: 800;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  }

      border-bottom: 0;

		<content:encoded><![CDATA[<div class="issue-detail-wrapp">
<section class="g-content">
<div class="container">
<div class="content-wrap">

    Your tremendous feedback motivates us to continue on this journey of keeping you savvy. In this issue check out the hidden power of Microsoft Teams and read about the WWW tool by our client Chirantan Joshi. Hope you enjoy reading and do forward to your friends to increase our subscriber base.
<p id="s-txt">This newsletter is written, designed, and developed by our content team.</p>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>TECHNOLOGY</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2023/microsoft-teams.webp" alt="Microsoft Teams"></div>
<h3>Exploiting Microsoft Teams</h3>
Microsoft TEAMS is not just for video-conferencing or messaging but is a comprehensive collaboration tool that can raise your company’s productivity by multiples. The key to this is creating a roadmap for implementation and sustainment. In this excerpt, we explore prominent elements of the Teams platform.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/the-power-of-teams-microsoft/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (1 min) &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="technology">
<div class="container">
<div class="work-content d-width">
<h2>GUEST GURU</h2>
<div class="b-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2023/www-tool.webp" alt="WWW Tool"></div>
<h3>Keeping Meeting Discussions Alive with WWW Tool</h3>
</div>
</div>
</section>
<section class="b-club">
<div class="container">
<div class="guest-guru">
<div class="left"><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshi8/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> <img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2023/chirantan-joshi.webp" alt="Chirantan Joshi"> </a>
<h3>Chirantan Joshi</h3>
</div>
<div class="right">

    In meetings, conversations that discuss work schedules are often forgotten, and as days pass by people can hardly recollect the tasks assigned to them or their deadlines. In order to simplify task management and bring in more clarity, the WWW Tool is a foolproof method to break complex projects into manageable tasks.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.chirantanjoshi.com/blog/keep-discussions-alive-even-after-meetings-end-with-www-tool/?utm_source=email&amp;utm_medium=newsletter&amp;utm_campaign=emq4" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Reading time: (2 mins) &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="em-contain">

    Chirantan Joshi is the National Director of <a style="color: #000000 !important; text-decoration: underline;" href="https://corporateconnections.ae/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">CorporateConnections UAE Chapter,</a> a premiere forum for accelerating business and personal growth.

</div>
</div>
</section>
<div class="border"></div>
<section class="s-mantras">
<div class="container">
<h2>THINKING ALOUD</h2>
<div class="blog-content d-width">
<div class="left">
<div class="d-img"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2023/hsp.webp" alt="Highly Sensitive Persons">
<h3>Managing Highly Sensitive Persons at Work</h3>
Have you come across people who think and feel deeply? Among the various individuals we come across, some are Highly Sensitive Persons (HSP). In this piece, we explain the inherent traits of HSPs and ways to manage them.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/managing-highly-sensitive-persons-at-work/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>

</div>
</div>
<div class="right"><img src="https://mailer.emqubeweb.com/january2023/who-original-one.webp" alt="Who Original One?">
<h3>If you had a Clone, who would be the Original One?</h3>
The question of who would be the "original" one if you had a clone is thought-provoking, not just because it involves cloning but because it reveals something essential about our ideas regarding identity and individuality.

<a class="b-read" href="https://www.emqubeweb.com/blog/if-you-had-a-clone-who-would-be-the-original-one/" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> Read more &gt; </a>
